description: Workflow for creating application messages after validation, business rule checks, database insert, and response mapping.

api_endpoint.description: Creates a new application message for a division after validating request data and checking active message overlap.

body_fields.name: message
body_fields.description: Body content of the application message.

body_fields.name: messageSeverity
body_fields.description: Severity level of the application message.

body_fields.name: startDateTime
body_fields.description: Start date and time when the message becomes active.

body_fields.name: endDateTime
body_fields.description: Optional end date and time when the message expires.

body_fields.name: targetRoles
body_fields.description: Optional list of roles targeted by the application message.

workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 404 or 405 when route or method is unsupported.

workflow_steps.description: Validates required request headers including Client-Id, Subclient-Id, Division-Id, Store-Number, Trace-Id, Associateid, X-Acting-As-Id, and X-Acting-As-Type.
workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 400 when required headers are missing.
test_expectations: Returns HTTP 400 when Client-Id is missing.
Returns HTTP 400 when Division-Id is missing.
Continues processing when all required headers are present.

workflow_steps.description: Validates that Division-Id is numeric and X-Acting-As-Type equals global.
workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 400 when header values are invalid.
test_expectations: Returns HTTP 400 when Division-Id is non-numeric.
Returns HTTP 400 when X-Acting-As-Type is not global.
Continues processing when header formats are valid.

workflow_steps.description: Validates required request body fields including title, message, messageSeverity, and startDateTime.
workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 400 when required body fields are missing.
test_expectations: Returns HTTP 400 when title is missing.
Returns HTTP 400 when message is missing.
Returns HTTP 400 when startDateTime is missing.
Continues processing when required body fields are present.

workflow_steps.description: Validates that messageSeverity and targetRoles contain only supported values.
workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 400 when enum fields contain unsupported values.
test_expectations: Returns HTTP 400 when messageSeverity is unsupported.
Returns HTTP 400 when targetRoles contains unsupported role.
Continues processing when enum values are valid.

workflow_steps.description: Builds database lookup context using division, startDateTime, and endDateTime.
workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 500 when lookup context cannot be built.

workflow_steps.description: Queries APP_MSGS to determine whether an active message already exists for the same division and overlapping time window.
workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 500 when active message lookup query fails.
workflow_steps.generation_notes: Generate repository query or Node-RED database node for active message overlap check.
test_expectations: Returns zero when no active overlapping message exists.
Returns count greater than zero when overlapping active message exists.
Returns database error when query execution fails.

workflow_steps.description: Rejects the request when activeMessageCount is greater than zero.
workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 409 when overlapping active message exists.
test_expectations: Continues processing when activeMessageCount is zero.
Returns HTTP 409 when activeMessageCount is greater than zero.

workflow_steps.description: Builds database insert payload using validated headers and request body fields.
workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 500 when insert payload cannot be built.

workflow_steps.description: Inserts a new application message into APP_MSGS and returns the generated message ID.
workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 500 when database insert fails.
test_expectations: Returns generated message ID when insert succeeds.
Returns database error when insert fails.

workflow_steps.description: Maps generated message ID into final API success response.
workflow_steps.error_behavior: Return HTTP 500 when response mapping fails.

workflow_steps.description: Returns HTTP 201 with generated message ID when processing succeeds.

error_handling.description: Returned when required headers, body fields, formats, or enum values are invalid.
Returned when an active overlapping message already exists for the same division.

response_shape.message: An active overlapping message already exists.

error_handling.description: Returned when a database query or command fails.
Returned when request transformation, response mapping, or internal processing fails.
